prompt: Commercial food advertising photography, hyper-detailed and appetizing. Seamless saturated studio background in flat deep turmeric yellow #F7AE00, with a subtle darker vignette at the bottom edge and slightly lighter glow upper-left. Punchy directional studio key light from upper left, crisp defined edges, crisp soft-edged drop shadow. Small crumbs and particles suspended around the subject. Colors rich and saturated but food tones natural and true. An Indian woman's hands, mid-40s, warm brown skin, thin gold bangles at the wrist, short unpolished nails, holding a snack pouch out toward the camera; the pack is tack sharp, the hands slightly soft. The pouch: a premium matte stand-up pouch in the exact same deep turmeric yellow as the background, bold minimalist color-block design printed in cream #F6EDDD ink: at the top an elegant high-contrast serif logotype reading exactly "Seema", beneath it a small Devanagari word reading exactly "सीमा", below that the product name stacked huge across two lines in cream serif reading exactly "Bhajani chakli", beneath it one small monospace line reading exactly "no palm oil · no preservatives", and "250 g" in small monospace near the bottom. A circular clear window in the lower third shows golden-brown bhajani chakli inside: a tight FLAT Archimedean spiral coil of four concentric turns, deeply ridged extruded dough with black and white sesame seeds in the ridges, never rings, never twists. Two whole golden-brown ridged chakli spirals float in the air beside the pack with crumbs and sesame seeds suspended. All label text perfectly legible, correctly spelled, cleanly typeset.
